description_long: This object appears to be a stylized doll with a geometric, faceted design, featuring angular surfaces and sharp edges. The body is composed of several distinct planes, with a prominent triangular or wedge-shaped form that may represent the torso or head. The color palette includes muted earth tones, with visible areas of brown, gray, teal, and black, suggesting a modern or abstract aesthetic. The surface finish is matte, with no visible gloss or shine, and the overall structure is solid and compact. There are no visible facial features, limbs, or clothing details, indicating a minimalist or abstract representation of a doll. The object is likely made from plastic or resin, with a hollow or partially solid interior.
description: A faceted, angular doll with a minimalist, abstract design in brown, gray, teal, and black matte colors. The form is geometric and lacks detailed features, giving it a modern, stylized appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows a large, flat brown surface with sharp edges, likely representing the back or side of the doll.
description_view_1: This view reveals a gray, angular plane with a pointed edge, possibly the base or another side of the doll.
description_view_2: This view displays a teal vertical edge and a black recessed area, suggesting a side profile with more color contrast.
description_view_3: This view highlights a tall, narrow brown triangular shape, likely the top or a side of the doll.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing or garment details; the doll's surface is composed of solid color planes with no patterns or fabric textures.
attribute_pose: The doll is depicted in a static, upright position with no discernible limbs or head orientation; the form is abstract and geometric.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible on the doll.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle is present on the doll.
